title: Senior Doctor - Novartis India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Novartis India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Novartis India has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Kolkata office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Novartis India:
Novartis India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Novartis India!
